name: probable-disco
description: Portable C++ voxel forest engine targeting WebAssembly and Nintendo Switch homebrew.
author: AndyPants

scripts.build:web: cmake -E rm -rf dist/web && emcmake cmake -S . -B build/web -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DWEB_DIST_DIR=dist/web && cmake --build build/web && cmake -E echo "Web build output:" && find dist/web -maxdepth 3 -type f
scripts.build:switch: cmake -E rm -rf dist/switch && cmake -E make_directory dist/switch && make -B -f Makefile.switch && cmake -E copy build/switch/probable-disco.nro dist/switch/probable-disco.nro && cmake -E copy build/switch/probable-disco.elf dist/switch/probable-disco.elf && cmake -E echo "Switch build output:" && find dist/switch -maxdepth 1 -type f
